name: George Lopez
bio: George Lopez is an American stand-up comedian and actor whose material centers on Mexican American culture, family, and race relations drawn from a difficult East Los Angeles upbringing. He created and starred in the ABC sitcom George Lopez from 2002 to 2007 and later hosted the late-night show Lopez Tonight. He has released multiple HBO and Netflix stand-up specials.

timeline.ev: HBO special Tall, Dark and Chicano; launches Lopez Tonight
Netflix special Well Do It For Half
NBC sitcom Lopez vs Lopez premieres

accolades: Time 25 Most Influential Hispanics in America (2005)
Multiple Grammy nominations for Best Comedy Album

bits.t: Why Latino Men Dont Go to the Doctor
